title: Notifications -  Device updating
scenario: User taps on "Device software is updating..." notification while app is in background and is taken to Software Update screen with DFU progress bar
steps: Ensure the device has a firmware version lower than the current version on the server (Cloud).
Observe the notification that appears: 'Device software is updating...'.
Send the app to the background.
Tap the notification while the app is in the background.
expected: The app opens to the Software Update screen showing the DFU progress bar.
